daily.today_energy: Your vibe is expansive and magnetic rn. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and share your wild ideas without overthinking it. Trust the momentum.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, there's potential for a deeper convo today—vulnerability looks good on you. Single? Someone's been noticing your energy from afar. Stay open.
daily.career: Your creative instincts are sharp. This is the day to pitch that project you've been sitting on or take a risk you've been considering. Your confidence is your superpower.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, a workout, or just dancing in your room, get that energy flowing. You'll feel the shift immediately.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your zone of self-expression, babe. This week's all about finding your voice and letting people see the real you. Trust the vibe shifts—they're pointing you somewhere good.
weekly.love: If you've been holding back, the cosmic weather says it's time to be real. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language rn. Someone's definitely noticing your energy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. You've got momentum on your side, so pitch that thing you've been thinking about. The universe is rewarding initiative—even small moves count.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement and less scrolling. Find something that feels like play, not punishment. Your nervous system will thank you for the shift in energy.
